[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 1101010 4
3 0010000 1
4 1011110 5
5 0011001 3
6 0110111 5
7 1111101 6

01 10 0000000 a match 0 1
12 21 0010000 1 match 3
23 32 0011000 2
34 43 0010001 2
45 54 0110101 4
56 65 1100000 2
67 76 1100000 2
70 07 1101000 3

02 20 1001010 3
13 31 0010000 1 match 3
24 42 0010110 3
35 53 0011001 3 match 5
46 64 0100000 1
57 75 1101000 3
60 06 1100000 2
71 17 0000000 a match 0 1

03 30 0001000 1
14 41 0010000 1 match 3
25 52 1011100 4
36 63 0000000 a match 0 1
47 74 0100000 1
50 05 1101000 3
61 16 0000000 a match 0 1
72 27 1001000 2

04 40 0100010 2
15 51 0010000 1 match 3
26 62 1000000 1
37 73 0001000 1
